arts.ttl: Papers: Spurs, Newcastle & Bournemouth keen on Feyenoord winger
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Friday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Newcastle's Isak keen on Liverpool - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Newcastle striker Alexander Isak is keen on a move to Liverpool, Manchester United are tracking Ipswich forward Liam Delap, plus more.

arts.ttl: I was ridiculed as 'way out of my depth' with cruel PlayStation jibe after Newcastle exit
arts.sum: Former Newcastle United assistant Ian Cathro has bounced back from a bruising first taste of management to oversee Estoril's best run of form in nearly 77 years. "Gradually, right from the beginning of the season, we have been improving," he told talkSPORT after Estoril's best run of results since 1948.

arts.ttl: Man City's Akanji out of Madrid and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Defender Manuel Akanji has been ruled out of Manchester City's Champions League return with Real Madrid and their Premier League clash with Liverpool amid fears he could be set for an extended absence with a muscular problem.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United learn VAR change after FA Cup fifth round technology twist
arts.sum: "The operation of Semi-Automated Offside Technology does not change the accuracy of the decision making but enhances the speed and efficiency of the process." Newcastle United will be one of the first teams to experience semi-automated offside technology after it was announced it will be utilised in the FA Cup's fifth round this season.

arts.ttl: Report: Newcastle United will have to pay ‘record’ fee to land 25-year-old German winger
arts.sum: Celtic will demand a record fee to sell Nicolas-Gerrit Kuhn, who is liked by Newcastle United. The Magpies are ultimately looking to find their successor to Miguel Almiron, who returned to Atlanta United during the January transfer window. Leeds United, long-time admirers of Kuhn, are also in the mix, reports TeamTalk. However, their ability to […] The post Report: Newcastle United will have to pay ‘record’ fee to land 25-year-old German winger appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti makes Real Madrid history during Champions League victory over Manchester City
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is undoubtedly one of the best managers that Real Madrid have ever had, and he continues to show that during his second spell in charge at the Santiago Bernabeu. He has already won 15 major honours as head coach, and with two of those having come this season, he will be keen to […] The post Carlo Ancelotti makes Real Madrid history during Champions League victory over Manchester City appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United watch on as Man City get 115 charges transfer ban verdict
arts.sum: Newcastle United and their Premier League rivals have been left in suspense over the outcome of City's hearing into 115 alleged breaches of Premier League financial rules, with Pep Guardiola anticipating a decision 'in a month.' The hearing, which took place before an independent panel from September to December, saw the club vehemently deny all charges. Carragher responded: "Is that a sign that you [Man City] think you won't be able to sign players in the summer?"

arts.ttl: Analysis: How Isak developed into a deadly Premier League forward
arts.sum: While in England, Dutch defender Hooiveld had faced distinguished strikers such as Sergio Aguero, Luis Suarez and Wayne Rooney, but when he was back at AIK preparing for the new 2016/17 campaign, he came across a young talent who he soon realised could also reach the very top. With 17 goals in only 22 Premier League matches this season, Alexander Isak is enjoying yet another excellent campaign and is one of the competition's best players.

arts.ttl: Report: Leeds United eye Newcastle veteran whose deal is up in the summer
arts.sum: Leeds United are keeping a close eye on Newcastle United striker Callum Wilson, whose contract is set to expire at the end of the season. That’s according to TBR Football anyway, who have claimed that the Premier League hopefuls have turned their attention to the Magpies hitman.
